contents:
[package]
name = "cudaforge"
version = "0.1.6"
edition = "2021"
authors = ["Guoqing Bao"]
description = "Advanced CUDA kernel builder for Rust with incremental builds, auto-detection, and external dependency support.\n"
readme = "./README.md"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
keywords = ["cuda", "gpu", "nvcc", "kernel", "build"]
categories = ["development-tools::build-utils", "compilers"]
repository = "https://github.com/guoqingbao/cudaforge"

[features]
default = []
ci-check = []

[dependencies]
glob = "0.3.1"
num_cpus = "1.16.0"
rayon = "1.10.0"
which = "7.0.0"
sha2 = "0.10.8"
walkdir = "2.5.0"
anyhow = "1.0"
serde_json = "1.0"
thiserror = "2.0"
fs2 = "0.4"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
features = ["derive"]

[package]
name = "opentelemetry"
version = "0.31.0"
description = "OpenTelemetry API for Rust"
homepage = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry"
repository = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry"
readme = "README.md"
categories = ["development-tools::debugging", "development-tools::profiling", "api-bindings", "asynchronous"]
keywords = ["opentelemetry", "logging", "tracing", "metrics"]
license = "Apache-2.0"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.75.0"
autobenches = false

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustdoc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]

[dependencies.futures-core]
optional = true
version = "0.3"

[dependencies.futures-sink]
optional = true
version = "0.3"

[dependencies.pin-project-lite]
optional = true
version = "0.2"

[dependencies.thiserror]
optional = true
version = "2"
default-features = false

[dependencies.tracing]
optional = true
version = ">=0.1.40"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(all(target_arch = \"wasm32\", not(target_os = \"wasi\")))".dependencies]
js-sys = "0.3.63"

[features]
default = ["trace", "metrics", "logs", "internal-logs", "futures"]
futures = ["futures-core", "futures-sink", "pin-project-lite"]
trace = ["futures", "thiserror"]
metrics = []
testing = ["trace"]
logs = []
internal-logs = ["tracing"]

[dev-dependencies]
criterion = "0.5"

[dev-dependencies.opentelemetry_sdk]
path = "../opentelemetry-sdk"

[dev-dependencies.rand]
features = ["os_rng", "thread_rng"]
version = "0.9"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.0"
features = ["full"]

[[bench]]
name = "metrics"
harness = false
required-features = ["metrics"]

[[bench]]
name = "attributes"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "anyvalue"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "context_attach"
harness = false
required-features = ["tracing"]

[[bench]]
name = "context_suppression"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "baggage"
harness = false

[lib]
bench = false

[lints.rust]
edition_2024_expr_fragment_specifier = "allow"
if_let_rescope = "allow"
tail_expr_drop_order = "allow"

[lints.rust.rust_2024_compatibility]
level = "warn"
priority = -1

[lints.clippy.all]
level = "warn"
priority = 1

[package]
name = "opentelemetry-appender-tracing"
version = "0.31.1"
edition = "2021"
description = "An OpenTelemetry log appender for the tracing crate"
homepage = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-appender-tracing"
repository = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-appender-tracing"
readme = "README.md"
keywords = ["opentelemetry", "log", "logs", "tracing"]
license = "Apache-2.0"
rust-version = "1.75.0"
autobenches = false

[dependencies.log]
optional = true
version = "0.4.21"

[dependencies.opentelemetry]
features = ["logs"]
path = "opentelemetry"
version = "0.31"
default-features = false

[dependencies.tracing]
features = ["std"]
version = ">=0.1.40"
default-features = false

[dependencies.tracing-core]
version = ">=0.1.33"
default-features = false

[dependencies.tracing-log]
optional = true
version = "0.2"

[dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
features = ["registry", "std"]
version = "0.3"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies]
log = "0.4.21"
tracing-log = "0.2"
criterion = "0.5"

[dev-dependencies.opentelemetry-stdout]
features = ["logs"]
path = "opentelemetry-stdout"
version = "0.31"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.opentelemetry_sdk]
features = ["logs", "testing", "internal-logs"]
path = "opentelemetry-sdk"
version = "0.31"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.tracing]
features = ["std"]
version = ">=0.1.40"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
features = ["env-filter", "registry", "std", "fmt"]
version = "0.3"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(not(target_os = \"windows\"))".dev-dependencies.pprof]
version = "0.14"
features = ["flamegraph", "criterion"]

[features]
default = []
experimental_metadata_attributes = ["dep:tracing-log"]
experimental_span_attributes = []
bench_profiling = []

[[bench]]
name = "logs"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "log-attributes"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "span-attributes"
harness = false

[lib]
bench = false

[lints.rust]
edition_2024_expr_fragment_specifier = "allow"
if_let_rescope = "allow"
tail_expr_drop_order = "allow"

[lints.rust.rust_2024_compatibility]
level = "warn"
priority = -1

[lints.clippy.all]
level = "warn"
priority = 1

[package]
name = "opentelemetry-http"
version = "0.31.0"
description = "Helper implementations for sending HTTP requests. Uses include propagating and extracting context over http, exporting telemetry, requesting sampling strategies."
homepage = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-http"
repository = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-http"
keywords = ["opentelemetry", "tracing", "context", "propagation"]
license = "Apache-2.0"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.75.0"
autobenches = false

[features]
default = ["internal-logs"]
hyper = ["dep:http-body-util", "dep:hyper", "dep:hyper-util", "dep:tokio"]
reqwest = ["dep:reqwest"]
reqwest-blocking = ["dep:reqwest", "reqwest/blocking"]
reqwest-rustls = ["dep:reqwest", "reqwest/default-tls"]
reqwest-rustls-webpki-roots = ["dep:reqwest", "reqwest/default-tls", "reqwest/webpki-roots"]
internal-logs = ["opentelemetry/internal-logs"]

[dependencies]
async-trait = "0.1"
bytes = "1"

[dependencies.http]
version = "1.1"
default-features = false
features = ["std"]

[dependencies.http-body-util]
optional = true
version = "0.1"

[dependencies.hyper]
optional = true
version = "1.3"
default-features = false

[dependencies.hyper-util]
features = ["client-legacy", "http1", "http2"]
optional = true
version = "0.1"

[dependencies.opentelemetry]
features = ["trace"]
path = "opentelemetry"
version = "0.31"
default-features = false

[dependencies.reqwest]
optional = true
version = "0.13.1"
default-features = false

[dependencies.tokio]
features = ["time"]
optional = true
version = "1"
default-features = false

[lints.rust]
edition_2024_expr_fragment_specifier = "allow"
if_let_rescope = "allow"
tail_expr_drop_order = "allow"

[lints.rust.rust_2024_compatibility]
level = "warn"
priority = -1

[lints.clippy.all]
level = "warn"
priority = 1

[lib]
bench = false

[package]
name = "opentelemetry-otlp"
version = "0.31.0"
description = "Exporter for the OpenTelemetry Collector"
homepage = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-otlp"
repository = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-otlp"
readme = "README.md"
categories = ["development-tools::debugging", "development-tools::profiling", "asynchronous"]
keywords = ["opentelemetry", "otlp", "logging", "tracing", "metrics"]
license = "Apache-2.0"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.75.0"
autotests = false
autobenches = false

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustdoc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]

[[test]]
name = "smoke"
path = "tests/smoke.rs"
required-features = ["integration-testing"]

[dependencies.opentelemetry]
default-features = false
path = "opentelemetry"
version = "0.31"

[dependencies.opentelemetry_sdk]
default-features = false
path = "opentelemetry-sdk"
version = "0.31"

[dependencies.opentelemetry-http]
optional = true
default-features = false
path = "opentelemetry-http"
version = "0.31"

[dependencies.opentelemetry-proto]
default-features = false
path = "opentelemetry-proto"
version = "0.31"

[dependencies.prost]
optional = true
version = "0.14"

[dependencies.tonic]
optional = true
version = "0.14.1"
default-features = false

[dependencies.tonic-types]
optional = true
version = "0.14.1"

[dependencies.tokio]
features = ["sync", "rt"]
optional = true
version = "1"
default-features = false

[dependencies.reqwest]
optional = true
version = "0.13.1"
default-features = false

[dependencies.http]
optional = true
version = "1.1"
default-features = false
features = ["std"]

[dependencies.httpdate]
version = "1.0.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.serde]
features = ["derive"]
optional = true
version = "1.0"
default-features = false

[dependencies.thiserror]
version = "2"
default-features = false

[dependencies.serde_json]
optional = true
version = "1.0"

[dependencies.flate2]
version = "1.1.2"
optional = true

[dependencies.zstd]
version = "0.13"
optional = true

[dev-dependencies]
temp-env = "0.3.6"
async-trait = "0.1"

[dev-dependencies.tokio-stream]
features = ["net"]
version = "0.1"

[dev-dependencies.opentelemetry_sdk]
features = ["trace", "testing"]
default-features = false
path = "opentelemetry-sdk"
version = "0.31"

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"]
version = "1"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.futures-util]
version = "0.3"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.tonic]
features = ["router", "server"]
version = "0.14.1"
default-features = false

[features]
trace = ["opentelemetry/trace", "opentelemetry_sdk/trace", "opentelemetry-proto/trace"]
metrics = ["opentelemetry/metrics", "opentelemetry_sdk/metrics", "opentelemetry-proto/metrics"]
logs = ["opentelemetry/logs", "opentelemetry_sdk/logs", "opentelemetry-proto/logs"]
internal-logs = ["opentelemetry_sdk/internal-logs", "opentelemetry/internal-logs"]
serialize = ["serde", "serde_json"]
default = ["http-proto", "reqwest-blocking-client", "trace", "metrics", "logs", "internal-logs"]
grpc-tonic = ["tonic", "tonic-types", "prost", "http", "tokio", "opentelemetry-proto/gen-tonic"]
gzip-tonic = ["tonic/gzip"]
zstd-tonic = ["tonic/zstd"]
experimental-grpc-retry = ["grpc-tonic", "opentelemetry_sdk/experimental_async_runtime", "opentelemetry_sdk/rt-tokio"]
gzip-http = ["flate2"]
zstd-http = ["zstd"]
tls = ["tls-ring"]
tls-ring = ["tonic/tls-ring"]
tls-aws-lc = ["tonic/tls-aws-lc"]
tls-roots = ["tonic/tls-native-roots"]
tls-webpki-roots = ["tonic/tls-webpki-roots"]
http-proto = ["prost", "opentelemetry-http", "opentelemetry-proto/gen-tonic-messages", "http", "trace", "metrics"]
experimental-http-retry = ["opentelemetry_sdk/experimental_async_runtime", "opentelemetry_sdk/rt-tokio", "tokio", "httpdate"]
http-json = ["serde_json", "prost", "opentelemetry-http", "opentelemetry-proto/gen-tonic-messages", "opentelemetry-proto/with-serde", "http", "trace", "metrics"]
reqwest-blocking-client = ["reqwest/blocking", "opentelemetry-http/reqwest-blocking"]
reqwest-client = ["reqwest", "opentelemetry-http/reqwest"]
reqwest-rustls = ["reqwest", "opentelemetry-http/reqwest-rustls"]
reqwest-rustls-webpki-roots = ["reqwest", "opentelemetry-http/reqwest-rustls-webpki-roots"]
hyper-client = ["opentelemetry-http/hyper"]
integration-testing = ["tonic", "prost", "tokio/full", "trace", "logs"]

[lints.rust]
edition_2024_expr_fragment_specifier = "allow"
if_let_rescope = "allow"
tail_expr_drop_order = "allow"

[lints.rust.rust_2024_compatibility]
level = "warn"
priority = -1

[lints.clippy.all]
level = "warn"
priority = 1

[lib]
bench = false

[package]
name = "opentelemetry-proto"
version = "0.31.0"
description = "Protobuf generated files and transformations."
homepage = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-proto"
repository = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-proto"
readme = "README.md"
categories = ["development-tools::debugging", "development-tools::profiling", "asynchronous"]
keywords = ["opentelemetry", "otlp", "logging", "tracing", "metrics"]
license = "Apache-2.0"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.75.0"
autotests = false
autobenches = false

[lib]
doctest = false
bench = false

[[test]]
name = "grpc_build"
path = "tests/grpc_build.rs"

[[test]]
name = "json_serde"
path = "tests/json_serde.rs"

[features]
default = ["full"]
full = ["gen-tonic", "trace", "logs", "metrics", "zpages", "with-serde", "internal-logs"]
gen-tonic = ["gen-tonic-messages", "tonic/channel"]
gen-tonic-messages = ["tonic", "tonic-prost", "prost"]
trace = ["opentelemetry/trace", "opentelemetry_sdk/trace"]
metrics = ["opentelemetry/metrics", "opentelemetry_sdk/metrics"]
logs = ["opentelemetry/logs", "opentelemetry_sdk/logs"]
zpages = ["trace"]
profiles = []
testing = ["opentelemetry/testing"]
internal-logs = ["opentelemetry/internal-logs"]
with-schemars = ["schemars"]
with-serde = ["serde", "const-hex", "base64"]

[dependencies.tonic]
optional = true
features = ["codegen"]
version = "0.14.1"
default-features = false

[dependencies.tonic-prost]
optional = true
version = "0.14.1"

[dependencies.prost]
optional = true
version = "0.14"

[dependencies.opentelemetry]
default-features = false
path = "opentelemetry"
version = "0.31"

[dependencies.opentelemetry_sdk]
default-features = false
path = "opentelemetry-sdk"
version = "0.31"

[dependencies.schemars]
optional = true
version = "1.0"

[dependencies.serde]
optional = true
features = ["serde_derive", "std"]
version = "1.0"
default-features = false

[dependencies.const-hex]
optional = true
version = "1.14.1"

[dependencies.base64]
optional = true
version = "0.22.1"

[dev-dependencies]
tonic-prost-build = "0.14.1"
tempfile = "3.3.0"
serde_json = "1.0"

[dev-dependencies.opentelemetry]
features = ["testing"]
path = "opentelemetry"
version = "0.31"
default-features = false

[lints.rust]
edition_2024_expr_fragment_specifier = "allow"
if_let_rescope = "allow"
tail_expr_drop_order = "allow"

[lints.rust.rust_2024_compatibility]
level = "warn"
priority = -1

[lints.clippy.all]
level = "warn"
priority = 1

[package]
name = "opentelemetry-stdout"
version = "0.31.0"
description = "An OpenTelemetry exporter for stdout"
homepage = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-stdout"
repository = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-stdout"
readme = "README.md"
categories = ["development-tools::debugging", "development-tools::profiling", "asynchronous"]
keywords = ["opentelemetry", "tracing", "metrics", "logs"]
license = "Apache-2.0"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.75.0"
autobenches = false

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustdoc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]

[features]
default = ["trace", "metrics", "logs"]
trace = ["opentelemetry/trace", "opentelemetry_sdk/trace"]
metrics = ["opentelemetry/metrics", "opentelemetry_sdk/metrics"]
logs = ["opentelemetry/logs", "opentelemetry_sdk/logs"]

[dependencies.chrono]
features = ["now"]
version = "0.4.34"
default-features = false

[dependencies.opentelemetry]
path = "opentelemetry"
version = "0.31"
default-features = false

[dependencies.opentelemetry_sdk]
path = "opentelemetry-sdk"
version = "0.31"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies]
once_cell = "1.13"

[dev-dependencies.opentelemetry-appender-tracing]
path = "opentelemetry-appender-tracing"
version = "0.31.1"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.tracing]
features = ["std"]
version = ">=0.1.40"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
features = ["registry", "std"]
version = "0.3"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
features = ["full"]
version = "1"
default-features = false

[lints.rust]
edition_2024_expr_fragment_specifier = "allow"
if_let_rescope = "allow"
tail_expr_drop_order = "allow"

[lints.rust.rust_2024_compatibility]
level = "warn"
priority = -1

[lints.clippy.all]
level = "warn"
priority = 1

[lib]
bench = false

[package]
name = "opentelemetry_sdk"
version = "0.31.0"
description = "The SDK for the OpenTelemetry metrics collection and distributed tracing framework"
homepage = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-sdk"
repository = "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-rust/tree/main/opentelemetry-sdk"
readme = "README.md"
license = "Apache-2.0"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.75.0"
autobenches = false

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustdoc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]

[dependencies]
futures-channel = "0.3"
futures-executor = "0.3"

[dependencies.opentelemetry]
path = "opentelemetry"
version = "0.31"
default-features = false

[dependencies.opentelemetry-http]
optional = true
path = "opentelemetry-http"
version = "0.31"
default-features = false

[dependencies.futures-util]
features = ["std", "sink", "async-await-macro"]
version = "0.3"
default-features = false

[dependencies.percent-encoding]
optional = true
version = "2.0"

[dependencies.rand]
features = ["std", "std_rng", "small_rng", "os_rng", "thread_rng"]
optional = true
version = "0.9"
default-features = false

[dependencies.serde]
features = ["derive", "rc"]
optional = true
version = "1.0"
default-features = false

[dependencies.serde_json]
optional = true
version = "1.0"

[dependencies.thiserror]
version = "2"
default-features = false

[dependencies.url]
optional = true
version = "2.5"
default-features = false

[dependencies.tokio]
default-features = false
optional = true
version = "1"

[dependencies.tokio-stream]
optional = true
version = "0.1"

[dependencies.http]
optional = true
version = "1.1"
default-features = false
features = ["std"]

[target."cfg(not(target_has_atomic = \"64\"))".dependencies.portable-atomic]
version = "1"
default-features = false
features = ["fallback"]

[target."cfg(not(target_os = \"windows\"))".dev-dependencies.pprof]
version = "0.14"
features = ["flamegraph", "criterion"]

[dev-dependencies]
rstest = "0.23.0"
temp-env = "0.3.6"

[dev-dependencies.criterion]
features = ["html_reports"]
version = "0.5"

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"]
version = "1"
default-features = false

[features]
default = ["trace", "metrics", "logs", "internal-logs"]
trace = ["opentelemetry/trace", "rand", "percent-encoding"]
jaeger_remote_sampler = ["trace", "opentelemetry-http", "http", "serde", "serde_json", "url", "experimental_async_runtime"]
logs = ["opentelemetry/logs"]
metrics = ["opentelemetry/metrics"]
testing = ["opentelemetry/testing", "trace", "metrics", "logs", "tokio/sync"]
experimental_async_runtime = []
rt-tokio = ["tokio/rt", "tokio/time", "tokio-stream", "experimental_async_runtime"]
rt-tokio-current-thread = ["tokio/rt", "tokio/time", "tokio-stream", "experimental_async_runtime"]
internal-logs = ["opentelemetry/internal-logs"]
experimental_metrics_periodicreader_with_async_runtime = ["metrics", "experimental_async_runtime"]
spec_unstable_metrics_views = ["metrics"]
experimental_metrics_custom_reader = ["metrics"]
experimental_logs_batch_log_processor_with_async_runtime = ["logs", "experimental_async_runtime"]
experimental_logs_concurrent_log_processor = ["logs"]
experimental_trace_batch_span_processor_with_async_runtime = ["tokio/sync", "trace", "experimental_async_runtime"]
experimental_metrics_disable_name_validation = ["metrics"]
bench_profiling = []

[[bench]]
name = "context"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "span_builder"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "metrics_counter"
harness = false
required-features = ["experimental_metrics_custom_reader"]

[[bench]]
name = "metrics_gauge"
harness = false
required-features = ["experimental_metrics_custom_reader"]

[[bench]]
name = "metrics_histogram"
harness = false
required-features = ["experimental_metrics_custom_reader"]

[[bench]]
name = "trace"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "span"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "log_processor"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "log_enabled"
harness = false
required-features = ["experimental_logs_concurrent_log_processor"]

[[bench]]
name = "tracer_creation"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "log_exporter"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "batch_span_processor"
harness = false
required-features = ["testing"]

[[bench]]
name = "metric"
harness = false
required-features = ["metrics", "spec_unstable_metrics_views", "experimental_metrics_custom_reader"]

[[bench]]
name = "log"
harness = false
required-features = ["logs"]

[lib]
bench = false

[lints.rust]
edition_2024_expr_fragment_specifier = "allow"
if_let_rescope = "allow"
tail_expr_drop_order = "allow"

[lints.rust.rust_2024_compatibility]
level = "warn"
priority = -1

[lints.clippy.all]
level = "warn"
priority = 1

[source.vendored-sources]
directory = "cargo/vendor"

[source.crates-io]
replace-with = "vendored-sources"

[source."https://github.com/jbg/cudaforge"]
git = "https://github.com/jbg/cudaforge"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
